body:
## Summary
- Add a focused `--focus-exam-submission-finality-parity` validator path for mock-exam result persistence.
- Tighten the validator/test mirror so the exam route must persist exactly one mock-exam session with score, timestamp, counts, and question timings for readiness.
- Update the exam submit/review e2e expectation to match current provenance-badge behavior before submission.
- Clean up a duplicate `LegalPage` import in `app/sources.tsx` so lint stays green.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-exam-submission-finality-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test --test-name-pattern "mock exam|readiness|recordMockExamSession|completedAt|score|questionTimings" scripts/learning.test.js tests/content-progress-schema-parity.test.js`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/exam-submit-review.spec.ts --workers=1`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test:ownership`
- `npx --no-install prettier --check app/sources.tsx scripts/validate-content.js tests/content-progress-schema-parity.test.js tests/e2e/exam-submit-review.spec.ts`
- `git diff --check`
title: setup: focus exam readiness persistence guard
